## Dependency Graph (Critical Path)

```
INFRA-001 → AUTH-001 → WALLET-001 → CHAT-001 → CHAT-003 (billing loop) ← WALLET-002
                     ↓                                    ↓
                DIR-001                             CHAT-004 (auto-disconnect)
                     ↓
               KUNDLI-001 → KUNDLI-002 → KUNDLI-004 (AI report)
                                       → HORO-001 (daily horoscope)
```

**Critical path for MVP:** INFRA-001 → AUTH-001 → WALLET-001 → WALLET-002 → CHAT-001 → CHAT-003 → CHAT-004
